# Marketing Psychology

## Overview
Applies principles of behavioral psychology and persuasion to marketing copy, landing pages, and campaign strategy.

## Key Principles

### Scarcity
- Limited time, limited quantity, limited access
- Must be genuine — false scarcity erodes trust

### Social Proof
- Testimonials, user counts, case studies
- Logos of known clients
- "Join X others"

### Reciprocity
- Give value before asking for anything
- Free guides, tools, templates, assessments

### Authority
- Expert endorsements, certifications, credentials
- Data and research citations

### Commitment & Consistency
- Start with small yes (email signup) before big ask (purchase)
- Public commitments increase follow-through

### Loss Aversion
- "Don't miss out" > "Get this benefit"
- Frame what they'll lose, not just what they'll gain
